repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memory entries describe opbuild errors involving `const gert::StorageShape*` vs `const gert::Shape*` conversion and missing `GetDim`/`GetOriginShape` methods in TilingFunc or InferShape. The current failure (ca6k_02874) has two errors: 'StorageShape has no member named GetDim' and 'cannot convert const gert::Shape* to const gert::StorageShape*'. These memories provide analogous fixes: use the correct type (Shape or StorageShape) and avoid calling GetDim on StorageShape. Entries from ca6k_* ops are especially relevant as they share the same op category and failure pattern.
